```{=html}
<!-- _parameter_chunk.Rmd
     Shared knitr child template for all parameter chapters.

     Called via:
       res <- knitr::knit_child("templates/_parameter_chunk.Rmd",
                                envir = environment(), quiet = TRUE)
       cat(res, sep = "\n")

     The calling chunk must set `characteristic` (and optionally
     `sample_fraction`) before calling knit_child(). Those variables are
     inherited through `envir = environment()` and picked up by the source()
     calls below.

     All paths are relative to the project root (execute-dir: project in
     _quarto.yml), so this file works correctly from any chapter in
     the parameters/ subdirectory. -->
```

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.height=8, fig.width=10}
source("functions/static_boxplot_function.R")
source("functions/render_plots.R")
render_parameter_plots(plots)
```

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
source("functions/table_download.R")
download_tbl(char = characteristic)

source("functions/threshold_table.R")
# no_threshold_note is an optional character variable set in the calling chunk
# for parameters whose standard cannot be expressed as a numeric line on the plot
# (e.g. TSS, Turbidity). Falls back to the standard single-argument call.
if (exists("no_threshold_note", inherits = FALSE) && !is.null(no_threshold_note)) {
  show_threshold_table(characteristic, no_threshold_note = no_threshold_note)
} else {
  show_threshold_table(characteristic)
}
```
